steps.title: Use the faulty-methods clue
steps.content: Researchers claim the Hawthorne effect cannot be established because every attempt to detect it uses faulty research methods. The blank must mean proven by evidence.

steps.title: Choose the evidence word
steps.content: "Substantiated" means supported or established by evidence, which faulty methods would prevent. B means proposed, C means corrected, and D means instilled or taught, none of which fits the logic. The answer is A.
